data.title: Daylight Energy raises $75M to expand decentralized energy infrastructure network
data.description:
Daylight Energy secures $75M to grow its decentralized physical energy network. Framework Ventures leads funding; A16z Crypto, Coinbase Ventures join in. New DayFi protocol links energy infrastructure yields to DeFi investors
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/daylight-energy-raises-75m-to-expand-decentralized-energy-infrastructure-network/

data.title: Myriad Moves: Traders Flip Bearish on Bitcoin, Favor Ethereum Over Gold
data.description:
Top markets on Myriad this week include price predictions on Bitcoin, Solana’s chances of an all-time high, and Ethereum and gold racing to $5K.
source: https://decrypt.co/344667/myriad-moves-traders-bearish-bitcoin-favor-ethereum-over-gold

data.title: Garlinghouse says Ripple doesn’t control XRP — history suggests otherwise
data.description:
Garlinghouse says people who still refer to him as the CEO of XRP or believe that Ripple is in control of the asset need to be educated.
source: https://protos.com/garlinghouse-says-ripple-doesnt-control-xrp-history-suggests-otherwise/

data.description:
Under Chair Paul Atkins, the agency appears intent on turning from an enforcer into a collaborator.
source: https://coindoo.com/sec-chair-promises-a-more-open-framework-for-digital-assets/

data.title: HSBC avoids fallout from First Brands collapse as Wall Street counts losses
data.description:
HSBC has escaped the financial wreckage caused by the collapse of First Brands Group, a bankrupt auto-parts maker that’s left several Wall Street banks counting heavy losses, according to Bloomberg. On Thursday, HSBC confirmed that it had no exposure at all to First Brands’ failed financing deals, a rare case of staying clean while others […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hsbc-avoids-fallout-first-brands-collapse/

data.title: The Daily: Ripple CEO says US won’t return to hostile Gensler era crypto climate, Paxos mistakenly mints 300 trillion PayPal USD on Ethereum, and more
data.description:
The following article is adapted from The Block’s newsletter, The Daily, which comes out on weekday afternoons.

data.title: Ripple’s $1B GTreasury Deal Targets Multi-Trillion Corporate Treasury Market
data.description:
Ripple, the leading provider of digital asset infrastructure for enterprises, announced on Thursday its $1 billion acquisition of GTreasury, a global leader in treasury management systems.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ripple-breaks-into-corporate-treasury-with-1b-gtreasury-acquisition/

data.title: Daylight DePIN raises $75M to power decentralized solar energy grid
data.description:
Daylight removes the high upfront cost of installing solar panels and batteries, which has impeded the adoption of solar energy.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/daylight-depin-solar-energy-raises-75-million?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Fed Governor Milan: There is no need to cut interest rates by more than 50 basis points
data.description: Fed Governor Milan said he doesn't think a rate cut of more than 50 basis points is necessary, and there's no evidence in the data that tariffs are pushing up inflation; the opposite view is based on previous trends.

data.title: Coinbase Launches Global USDC Payouts and Payment Links – What Changes for Merchants
data.description:
Coinbase has introduced a new suite of tools through its Coinbase Business platform, designed to transform how companies send and receive money globally.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/coinbase-unveils-global-business-payment-tools-for-the-digital-economy/

data.title: Coinbase Adds BNB to its Listing Roadmap
data.description: Coinbase announced that it will include BNB in ​​its coin listing roadmap.

data.title: Fed Governor Milan: Differences in policy views are more about the pace of rate cuts than the ultimate goal of rate cuts
data.description: Fed Governor Milan said that the difference in policy views with his colleagues is more based on the pace of rate cuts rather than the ultimate goal of rate cuts. The Fed's current policy is tighter than people think because the neutral interest rate has fallen. (Jinshi)

data.title: Sony Bank subsidiary applies for OCC license to launch stablecoin and custody services in the US
data.description: Sony Bank subsidiary Connectia Trust has applied for a U.S. national banking charter to issue a dollar-pegged stablecoin, maintain reserve assets, and provide digital asset custody and management services.

data.title: SharpLink Strengthens Its Ethereum War Chest in $76.5M Premium-Priced Deal
data.description:
SharpLink Gaming raised $76. 5 million in a direct stock offering priced above market, reinforcing institutional confidence in its Ethereum treasury strategy.

The post SharpLink Strengthens Its Ethereum War Chest in $76. 5M Premium-Priced Deal first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/10/16/sharplink-strengthens-eth-war-chest/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=sharplink-strengthens-eth-war-chest

data.title: Stablecoin Market Smashes $318 Billion Record as USDC and USDT Dominate
data.description:
The stablecoin market has soared to an all-time high of $318 billion as U. S. regulatory clarity and rising institutional participation drive adoption.

data.title: Federal Reserve Gov. Michael Barr warns of gaps in recently passed GENIUS stablecoin law
data.description:
A new law regulating stablecoins is a meaningful improvement, but has some gaps that need to be filled, said Fed Governor Barr.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/374993/federal-reserve-michael-barr-warns-gaps-genius-stablecoin-law?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: US Treasury Secretary Benson: Quantitative easing reform is an important consideration in the selection of the next Fed chairman
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson said that quantitative easing reform is an important consideration in selecting the next Federal Reserve chairman, and he does not advocate that the Fed reduce its balance sheet or abandon its ample reserve system. (Jinshi)

data.title: Kraken Buys CFTC-Licensed Designated Contract Market Small Exchange for $100M
data.description:
The acquisition is part of Kraken’s strategy to launch a fully U. S. -native derivatives product suite.
source: https://www.nftgators.com/kraken-buys-cftc-licensed-designated-contract-market-small-exchange-for-100m/

data.title: Bitcoin fear index hits yearly low, but it’s time to accumulate, not panic: Bitwise
data.description:
Bitcoin investor sentiment slumps to a yearly low, but Bitwise says fear may signal a prime accumulation phase for BTC.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-fear-index-hits-yearly-low-but-it-s-time-to-accumulate-not-panic-bitwise?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
